title: Walkthrough: Runtimes — a selectable execution Faculty

segments.subtitle: Claude Code runtime · provider overrides · a selectable primary runtime

beats.caption: The composition grid — Runtimes is now a Faculty
beats.expectedScreen: Agent Garrison compose grid with an 'Agent faculties' and a 'Dev faculties' tier section; the Runtimes faculty tile sits in the Dev faculties section

beats.caption: The Runtimes Faculty — selectable execution engines
beats.expectedScreen: the Runtimes faculty station page listing runtime fittings, including a 'Claude Code runtime' fitting alongside Agent SDK / Codex / Gemini runtimes

beats.caption: Pick the PRIMARY runtime that runs the orchestrator
beats.expectedScreen: the Orchestrator global-config panel showing a 'primary_runtime' selector whose value is 'Default — Claude Code runtime'
